name: Iolo
answer1:
I play my lute
and receive the
good wishes of
the people.
answer2:
If you treat
someone else
well then they
will have reason
to do the same.
question:
Do you like
my music?

name: Gweno
job:
I dance and
sing for the
children.
answer1:
Dance is good
for the soul.
answer2:
To give to a
beggar shows
compassion.
question:
Do you give
to the needy?
yes:
Beggars are
thankful for
small donations.

name: a child
answer1:
The song goes:
Ho eyo he hum!
answer2:
It means:
Love to one
and all!
question:
Do you like
the song?
yes:
Then help us
spread the word!

name: a guard
answer1:
Across the
bridge our
people dance
and sing!
question:
Would thou like
to join them?
yes:
Remember, an
open heart is
the first step
on the path to
wisdom!
no:
Then you have
no business
across the
bridge.

name: Pepper
answer2:
The rune of
compassion lies
at the end of a
hall somewhere
in this towne.
question:
Dost thou seek
something?
no:
Alas, I may have
been able to
help.

name: Thevel
job:
I search for
the mystery of
the magic orbs.
answer1:
A one-handed
beggar knows
their secrets!
question:
Hast thou
seen him?
yes:
Only he knows
the orb's gift!
no:
Find him in
Serpent castle
for he knows of
orbs!

name: Joe
job:
Yo ho ho...
and a bottle...
of rum...
hic...
answer1:
The yellow stone
is in the
dungeon
Despise...
question: Give me rum?...
yes:
Thanxth...
my friend Joe
can help with
the stones...
hic...

name: Cricket
answer2:
The mantra for
the shrine of
compassion
is 'MU'!
question:
Now wilt thou
be quiet?
no:
I am going to
call the guards!

name: a guard
job:
I am a guard
of course!
answer1:
We guards have
a lot of
compassion.
answer2:
We always say:
Let all others'
troubles be as
thine own!
question:
Dost thou kill
non-evil
creatures?

name: a child
answer1:
The solution to
ones problems
often lies in
solving others!
answer2:
Never care so
much for thyself
that thou cannot
care for others!
question:
Know ye the
mantra of
compassion?

name: Shalimar
answer1:
It takes a
good deal of
compassion to
deal with
children!
answer2:
Compassion
strengthens the
soul as
knowledge
tempers the
mind!
question: Have any kids?
yes:
Thou dost know
what I mean!

name: Sebastian
answer1:
Mondain's
influence has
not left the
world!
answer2:
An artifact
remains! I heard
at Buccaneer's
Den!
question:
Wilt thou find
and destroy it?
yes:
Then ask at the
pub there of
the skull!

name: Shapero
answer1:
He knows the
true nature of
compassion.
answer2:
Seek out Julio
and ask him of
compassion!
question:
Art thou on the
Quest of the
Avatar?
yes:
Find the shrine
of compassion
east across 2
bridges!

name: Julio
job:
I seek the
true nature
of things!
answer1:
All things have
a true nature!
answer2:
Compassion
derives itself
from unending
love!
question:
Dost thou know
the true nature
of all things?
yes:
Thou art a liar
and a braggart.

name: Mentor
answer1:
Pride was too
great in
Magincia!
answer2:
The city was
destroyed by
daemons for
its pride!
question: Art thou proud?
no:
Pride exists
without truth,
love, or
courage!

name: Sprite
job:
I have no job so
now I beg!
health:
I fear I
shall die of
starvation!
answer1:
I have not eaten
in a week!
question:
Wilt thou
help me?
yes:
In return I
shall tell thee
that Pepper
knows of the
rune!
